programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 1
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 147
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MAS CAR WASH TYDAK RAMAH BINTANG 1
programme.desc: Resna’s plan for revenge against Ranti who hit her brother in an accident takes an unexpected turn. Instead of getting even, she ends up falling for Didan, the charming owner of the carwash.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 199
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Main Api Jadi Main Hati Bestie
programme.desc: Tasya (Naomi Zaskia) is heartbroken when her boyfriend Bryan (Arya Vasco) posts a photo with another girl, Avril. Determined not to give up, Tasya travels to Jakarta with a bold plan to crash their engagement party.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 1

programme.title: MARNI, PRIMADONA KAMPUNGAN
programme.desc: Focusing on the life of Marni, a character who has captured the attention of the villagers.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 148

programme.title: MENCINTAI LEWAT JALUR LANGIT YGY
programme.desc: Arya's love story that has been lived with Caca turns out to have another story, can Arya escape from her habits or even match with another woman?

programme.title: Gak Bisa Yura, Soalnya Dia Cewek Misterius
programme.desc: Laras (Larasati Nugroho) and Wisnu (Kevin Hillers) are bitter enemies who can never see eye to eye. However, they are forced to unite when a greedy businessman named Dayat threatens to seize their village's ancestral land. Furious that Dayat's company has desecrated Wisnu’s ancestral graves and plans to destroy a beautiful local waterfall for development, the two rivals must team up to stop the land grab.

programme.title: Bulan Terbelah di Hati Mas Silver
programme.desc: Fikri is a 'Silver Man' (street performer) who falls in love with Bulan, a beautiful municipal police officer (Satpol PP). Despite their frequent romantic encounters, Bulan remains professional. When duty calls, she doesn't hesitate to arrest Fikri, leading to a complicated 'cat-and-mouse' romance between the law and the street.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 201
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jerit Malam Berujung Cinta
programme.desc: Karina (Indah Nicole) joins an outdoor adventure club just to get closer to her crush. Dressed inappropriately in a miniskirt and thin clothes for a camping trip, she forgets to bring a jacket. Suddenly, a mysterious man named Tomi (Fendy Chow) hands her a jacket, though no one in the club seems to know who he is. During a terrifying night initiation, Karina realizes there’s more to Tomi than meets the eye.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 3

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 32
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 1
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Tua Pun Boleh - EP 8
programme.desc: Rancangan ini menampilkan pelbagai aktiviti lasak penuh aksi yang bakal diharungi oleh para selebriti veteran yang mengikuti aktiviti ini.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 10
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 4
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 25
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 2
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 18
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Kiah Pekasam - EP 12
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Kiah yang sangat jujur di dalam percakapannya memulakan kehidupan baru di kampungnya.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 17
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah program untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat - EP 2
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 35
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 49

programme.title: Ooops! Terlajak Nikah

programme.desc: Masihkah anda ingat akan Pi Mai Pi Mai Tang Tu, Senario, Salih Yaacob, dan ramai lagi lagenda komedi tanah air? Kini mereka kembali di atas satu pentas bagi mengubat kerinduan terhadap mereka.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2021 - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 2
programme.desc: Program untuk kanak-kanak bagi menyuarakan pendapat dan berkongsi buah fikiran mereka secara spontan.

programme.title: Super Wira - EP 6
programme.desc: Aman tiada kuasa istimewa tidak seperti ayahnya, ketua kumpulan Super Wira. Ibunya telah diculik oleh penjahat super yang misteri dan Aman cuba untuk menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Terbaekk! - EP 3
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 1
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Makan - EP 9
programme.desc: Meneroka masakan yang lain dari yang lain, memberikan tips mudah ketika di dapur dan membawa anda ke restoran-restoran yang terkemuka di sekitar Kuala Lumpur

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 9
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.desc: Rancangan masakan yang menguji kreativiti dan kecekapan selebriti untuk menyediakan hidangan kepada tetamu misteri menggunakan 3 bahan yang tersedia.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 2

programme.title: Konnichiwa Superlawak - EP 3

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 7
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 5
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Generasi Gamerz - EP 5
programme.desc: Dua selebriti "Gamerz" akan bekerjasama dengan ibu atau bapa mereka untuk bertanding di dalam cabaran permainan video popular seperti Mobile Legends, FIFA20 & banyak lagi!

programme.title: Gelak 90 Saat S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Mampukah 6 kumpulan pelawak membuat para juri misteri ketawa dalam masa 90 saat demi merebut ganjaran wang tunai pada setiap minggu?

programme.desc: A man wins a lottery and becomes wealthy, but his life becomes entangled in love, betrayal, and fate as relationships shift and greed takes over those around him. Release Year: 1981 Director: Manmohan Desai

programme.desc: A trainee nurse starts her first day at the deserted East London Royal Infirmary, where she must confront her haunting past and battle a dark force bent on destruction. Release Year: 2021 Director: Mahesh Manjrekar

programme.title: Pukar (1983)
programme.desc: In pre-independence Goa, revolutionaries fight Portuguese rule, but one fighter's son misinterprets a key event, growing up resenting the very heroes of the freedom struggle. Release Year: 1983 Director: Ramesh Behl

programme.title: Phata Poster Nikla Hero
programme.desc: Vishwas dreams of stardom but is mistaken for an inspector by Kajal, and when her strict mother arrives, his double life explodes into hilarious confusion. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: 5 nominations

programme.title: Raja Raja Chora
programme.desc: Bhaskar, a timid thief and Xerox worker, risks everything through an affair and a daring final heist, only to be trapped in chaos that flips his life upside down.

programme.desc: Opposites Yogi and Jaya meet through a dating app, reliving past romances on a quirky journey that brings laughter, self-discovery, and a surprising chance to find real love. Release Year: 2017 Director: Tanuja Chandra Awards: 2018 Winner Popular AwardBest Female DebutParvathy Thiruvothu

programme.title: Om Jai Jagdish
programme.desc: Three brothers, struggling with personal issues, must unite to save their ancestral home from auction. Their journey brings laughter, tears, and the rediscovery of family bonds. Release Year: 2002 Director: Anupam Kher

programme.title: Krantiveer
programme.desc: An ordinary man is transformed by a fearless journalist's ideals and takes a stand against corruption and injustice, eventually becoming a voice for the oppressed. Release Year: 1994 Director: Mehul Kumar Awards: 1995 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Actor- Nana Patekar

programme.title: Mercury
programme.desc: Five friends accidentally kill a blind man. Soon, his ghost begins haunting them, turning their lives into a terrifying spiral of guilt, fear, and supernatural revenge they cannot escape.

programme.title: English Vinglish
programme.desc: A shy housewife joins an English class to end her family's ridicule, slowly discovering confidence, self-respect, and the courage to claim her own voice. programme.title: Capitaine Marleau - EP 26
programme.desc: While investigating Lily's troubled past after she is found poisoned, Marleau quickly directs her suspicions toward Frederic Lefranc. The actor and director had sent several love letters to the young woman. From the theatre stage to the crime scene, the line becomes blurred.

programme.title: Chateau ! - EP 63
programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Chateau de Sully-sur-Loire, once a watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it was probably used by soldiers. Historical research continues to uncover its mysteries.

programme.title: Fumer Fait Tousser
programme.desc: Five justice fighters, the ''Tabac Force'', go on a retreat to strengthen their team cohesion. Until a sort of emperor of evil decides to wipe out the planet. Zany sketches, tight latex suits, DIY special effects, actors' performances: a bizarre gore fable but without toxicity!

programme.title: Au-Dela Des Murs
programme.desc: One morning, Lina is getting ready to go to Baumettes prison to attend her first visit. Nadjim, her boyfriend, has recently been imprisoned. Before leaving, she gathers things to take to him.

programme.title: La Confrontation
programme.desc: In a police station, Maxime, 17, is being questioned one last time today. Anxiety rises: she will soon have to face her greatest fear. Finding herself in the same room as the man who hurt her when she was a child, her godfather.

programme.title: L'audience
programme.desc: After having fled the Congo and clandestinely crossed eleven countries, Peggy, Simon and their three children are awaiting their hearing which will decide if they are accepted as refugees in Canada. Between past ghosts, future hopes and legal mazes, the film delves into the struggle by the Nkunga Mbala family.

programme.title: Hj Lim, Le Son Du Silence
programme.desc: A virtuoso pianist, Lim Hyun Jung revisits some of the places from her life: the family home in Anyang, Korea, Paris's prestigious Conservatoire National Superieur de Musique et de Danse, the church in Compiegne and the Baeknyeong Buddhist temple, discussing her loves, her sorrows, her doubts and her successes...

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 6
programme.desc: Etienne Moyat's creations reflect his deep respect and love for nature. A trained cabinetmaker, he produces unique, monumental pieces for high-end projects. Alongside this, he pursues an intense and instinctive painting practice.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Bp Ultimate Rally-Raid Portugal 2026
programme.desc: The highlights of the bp Ultimate Rally-Raid Portugal (17-22 March 2026), the 2nd round of the World Championship and the only stage held on European territory. A spectacular car and motorcycle competition, set against magnificent scenery between Spain and Portugal.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 15
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an antique shop in Yvelines. Then, she meets Manon in her workshop in Eure-et-Loir.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 16
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 41
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 42
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Fara - EP 9
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 51
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans ca - EP 37
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 2
programme.desc: Dog decides to take part in the discus competition. But to win he'll have to exert an incredible level of self control and overcome his instinct to run after it.

programme.title: Les Danger - EP 7
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Les Danger - EP 8
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 44
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 25
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 35
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 21
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 7
programme.desc: Flat tints, geometrization of lines, sharp contours... A landscape painter, with sky and water as recurring themes, Veronique Sudry shows both the omnipotence and the poetry of nature where beauty and unease coexist.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 6
programme.desc: Born in Rwanda and arriving in France at the age of six months, Mamari chose humor to address her personal story, marked by family trauma and mental health issues. On stage, notably in ''Too Funny to Die'', she breaks taboos with powerful dark humor.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 88
programme.desc: He's French and a very young vice world champion in boxing, light heavyweight category: Yojerlin Cesar is Mathieu Laurent's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 10
programme.desc: A meeting with artisans reinventing coffee and chocolate, blending tradition, creativity and boldness, in a subtle dialogue of flavors. Yadh Elyes, master roaster in Paris' 6th arrondissement, offers exceptional coffees. Richard Orlinski is invited to taste rare beans from Tanzania and Panama. Chocolatier Clement Niel has settled in Bangkok, where he fuses expertise and local flavors.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 3
programme.desc: The guide Pascale Roy Lafontaine welcomes a group who have come to join his surf camp in Haleiwa, in the Hawaiian archipelago. The perfect opportunity for a hike along the Kuli'ou'ou ridge and admire its spectacular panorama, all amidst the lush vegetation of a unique ecosystem.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 9
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 24
programme.desc: On the menu: waffle bar, potato and cheese curd egg casserole, solo chakchouka, khachapuri.

programme.title: Parlons eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Grand echiquier - EP 8
programme.desc: Singers, musicians, dancers, choreographers and young talent all come together to share the prestigious stage of the ''Grand echiquier''; turning it into the largest concert venue in France, just for the time of the programme.

programme.title: Les Secrets Du Finistere - Le Garcon Qui Marchait Sur Les Vagues
programme.desc: A surfer is shot dead in the heart at La Torche. When Captain Laubier discovers on the victim's computer a video of a lecture by Le Dantec about the sunken city of Ys, he contacts her. The young woman's intuitions lead her onto unexpected paths.

programme.title: Movie - Raajiyam
programme.desc: Karthikeyan runs a secret agency. When he proves that the governor's son had killed his own wife, the leader gets angry and decides to seek revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Time
programme.desc: Srinivasa, who works as a painter, is engaged to Thulasi. Due to certain unfortunate events, his engagement breaks and he struggles to resolve the problems and marry her.

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Kisu Kisu
programme.desc: Sriram and Indu are classmates who barely know each other. But Indu's stern father begins to suspect that the two are having an affair. Thus he makes his daughter's life miserable.

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Solla Vandhen
programme.desc: Prabhu, a college student, falls in love with Sandhya. However, he faces complications when he finds out that she is two years his elder.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Sudhanthiram
programme.desc: Two brothers, who always look out for each other, start working for a gangster after their father's death. But both of them get into a conflict when the younger one decides to testify against the gangster for a murder he committed.

programme.title: Movie - Chandramouli
programme.desc: A woman loves both her sons equally, but her biological son hates his adopted brother. One day, they along with the other villagers are forced to evacuate, and the adopted son is separated from them. He grows up with an aim to find them.

programme.title: Movie - Cheran Pandian
programme.desc: Periya Gounder, who adheres to the caste system, ill-treats his stepbrother Chinna as his mother is from a lower caste. His life takes a turn when his daughter falls in love with Chinna's relative.

programme.title: Movie - Jodi
programme.desc: Kannan's father is against love marriage. Kannan loves Gayatri, whose father was once a great music critic. Both decide to win the hearts of each other's family and only marry with their consent.

programme.title: Movie - Lathi Charge
programme.desc: Police constable Muruganantham gets suspended after he laththi-charges Vella, a criminal and a notorious gangster's son. What happens when he faces their wrath of vengeance while trapped in a building with his son?

programme.title: Movie - Aarathu Sinam
programme.desc: Police officer Aravind resorts to alcohol after his wife and daughter get killed by criminals. He looks forward to regaining his old self by taking up the case of a serial killer.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2024/2025 (LIV)
programme.desc: Relive another extraordinary Premier League campaign as Liverpool soared to an historic 20th league title, Nottingham Forest defied expectations and the promoted sides were strenuously challenged. There were also tactical transformations, shifts in narrative trends, and a more open field than ever before. Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.desc: Light-hearted, inclusive and entertaining, Welcome to the Weekend is the show that kicks off the Premier League weekend. We will focus on the football but also on the lifestyle topics that footballers and fans love - food, fashion, music, movies and much, much more.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2018/2019 season.

programme.title: TEAM TALKS - FRI 22 MAY
programme.desc: Punditry, pressers and predictions ahead of the PL weekend. Our studio team tackle all the major talking points and we hear from the headline acts as the players and the managers have their say ahead of the action.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 109
programme.desc: Dipsy and Laa-Laa drive to the Hidey Hup in the Tubby Car. They meet Tinky Winky and Po and the Teletubbies go on the Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S5) - EP 3
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'carrot' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of carrots!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Messy borrows Zoe's umbrella, and it gets swept away by the rain. Messy and his friends go on a white-water adventure down the drain in search for it.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 23
programme.desc: Tao needs help learning to fly his new wingsuit for a big town event, and Mojo and Bo are the experts. Can they help him find his inner bird before it's too late?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 45
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are upset after hearing of the species that need help. Ubercorn tries to cheer them up by planning a visit to the forests of Sao Paulo.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 17
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want mum and dad to smoochy kiss, so they set up a romantic evening for two at their fancy restaurant. Everything goes to plan, until chef Bingo's special arrives.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Andy heads to Japan to record a video of a male pufferfish building its nest in the sand.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 41
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 39
programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 52
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are in snowy Norway to learn about the Sami reindeer. The reindeers are migrating and need to get a ferry to their warmer summer home.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 51
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has travelled to Ilulissat in Greenland to show his teddy, Cuddles, the sights. But Cuddles ends up getting stuck in the snow!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 13
programme.desc: When the Rickety Old Bridge collapses, trapping Toby and Henrietta on the other side of the ravine, inventor Ruth is asked to build a new one.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 39

programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones, just like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. The stones are big - will it take more than Mojo's crane top to move them?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 46
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are in the Gulf of Mexico to learn about Manatees, peaceful water mammals that spend most of their time either sleeping or eating sea-grass.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: The Heelers take a long riverside walk, but Bingo's legs are tired, and she wants a piggyback. To distract her, mum and dad invent fun games and get her little legs moving again.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Andy heads to Brazil and meets a troop of capuchin monkeys who lead him to some honey.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch is busy with the Playtimers making a tasty treat called Munchy Muddy Meadows.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 42
programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 41
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Glitch is not happy when he has to work with Kyan in a Hollywood film.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 52
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are in snowy Norway to learn about the Sami reindeer. The reindeers are migrating and need to get a ferry to their warmer summer home.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 14
programme.desc: Yong Bao tells Thomas the story of how he came to have a magnificent tiger emblem on his tender.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: Duck sees some flying, migrating ducks in the sky and decides he would like to try it too.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: When Sarah and Duck are racing paper planes, they chance upon an exciting discovery.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Stanley and the children tour the museum and quickly realise there's nothing about them or their friends, so they make a new exhibit all about their town today!

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: The talking animals talk about all the things they love about the ocean.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: JoJo wishes Gran Gran could join her on a bike ride in the park, so Gran Gran decides to fix her old bicycle. After a good clean and fix-up, she's ready to ride!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels think about life's big questions, and gain their Philosophy badges.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When lightning strikes Academy Island, it causes a power cut. Can the Go Jetters rescue their trapped friends without the power they need to call for Click-ons?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song "We're Chilli When It's Hot"

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song "All My Friends" to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 7

programme.desc: Burdened by a string of bad luck, the remaining participants find their chances of success begin to slip away. One survivalist addresses a ruined shelter, while another must find a way to avoid starvation.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16) - EP 245
programme.desc: Along the Earth's north 37th parallel, there have been so many reports of UFO's that it has been dubbed The UFO Superhighway. Is there something about this latitude attracting extraterrestrial visitors?

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: The team has secret intel on a wreck that might be a legendary 1930s disappearance: the champion racing yacht known as Ingomar. Lured by a light, the Ingomar's seasoned crew smashes into an obstacle.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26) - EP 387
programme.desc: From a Michigan man who was there, Mike learns about Evel Knievel's rocket-powered Snake Canyon jump-and is determined to buy a one-of-a-kind billboard rescued from the site.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10) - EP 17
programme.desc: Four smiths must sift through a pile of junk in order to make a signature Damascus blade. After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex broadsword.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 6
programme.desc: As the season hits full stride, alligators begin changing their behaviours-and the hunters must adjust to stay ahead. Joey and Zak swap their trademark weapons to see who can nab the biggest bulls.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 12
programme.desc: The evidence is building, and the team believes they are finally zeroing in on the Treasure Vault. With confidence at an all-time high, the Fellowship prepares to retrieve it as they call in the caissons.

programme.title: The Death Coast - EP 8
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 3
programme.desc: A peaceful Sunday morning ends in tragedy when a car accident ends in a deadly altercation. A 25-year old man is charged with second-degree murder after he shoots a teenage driver dead.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 6
programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Growing up gay in the hyper-masculine Bayou was tough on Ronald Dominique. An inability to connect and a prison sexual assault would cement his decision to ultimately kill his first victim.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 2
programme.desc: After years of torment, Nicole files for divorce, embarking on a new chapter that includes a risky affair with one of OJ's close friends. But a failed reconciliation led Nicole to a final, fatal stand.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 533
programme.desc: After a 69-year-old woman is found dead in her bathtub, a suspect leads Tulsa detectives on a high-speed chase that ends tragically.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 5

programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.desc: When a witness sees a nightclub owner jump to his death from his fifth-floor condo, the case is seemingly open and shut; that is until Dr. Jennifer Nara's autopsy reveals shocking new evidence.

programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Those closest to Madison Nygard share the agonising details around the beautiful 16-year-old's terrifying abduction as she walked home from a party.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: When beautiful Jalajhia Finklea vanished the day before her 18th birthday, her Wampanoag Tribe members immediately took action.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 161
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A man attempts a daring escape from court; a judge has to deal with a defendant's outburst; an inmate tries to have his attorney removed from his case.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 163
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A man attacks a defendant who's charged with the murder of his twin brother; a judge plays an ill-advised prank on an attorney; and more.

programme.title: The Braemar Hill Murders
programme.desc: In April 1985, two western teenagers studying in Hong Kong were set upon by a gang of Chinese youths, who proceeded to torture and stab them to death.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 122
programme.desc: When two beloved brothers are gunned down in their home, their devastated mother leads Gwinnett detectives to a suspect close to home.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25) - EP 500
programme.desc: When a man is shot on the side of the road, clues lead Detective Jason White to an ongoing crime spree in his 100th case for Tulsa Homicide.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: Nick Davis investigates a local artist found murdered in his home. With very little evidence, Detective Davis methodically pursues every lead until a lucky break points him toward a surprise suspect.

programme.title: The Persians - A History of Iran (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: In this first episode, Samira journeys to places rarely seen by western audiences to reveal how the Persian Empire was born, the mysterious writing of its early people and how Iran's powerful kings built a vast empire that became the envy of the ancient world.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci returns to Tuscany, his former home, alongside his parents Stan and Joan. Tuscany is the birthplace of the Renaissance and world-class art, architecture and culture.

programme.title: Inside the Factory (S9) - EP 4
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness enjoys a lot of taste tests when he visits a factory in London to learn how they produce sticky toffee flapjacks on an epic scale.

programme.title: Food Factory (S5) - EP 3
programme.desc: Meet the worker bees who transform raw honey into liquid gold; a California bakery turns out 50,000 loaves of sprouted wheatbread; meet the cookie doctor behind a unique checkerboard creation; and it takes a team of experts to produce irresistible chocolate-covered cherries.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 80
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 3
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 2
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.desc: A year following a group of lawyers as they sue the Department of Homeland Security and scramble to help free those arrested under Donald Trump's immigration policies.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America. The strength of the program is its storytelling. programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.desc: Nobunaga hands over the clan to his son Nobutada (Koseki Yuta) and begins building a grand castle in Azuchi with his sights set on unifying the realm. Hideyoshi joins Shibata Katsuie (Yamaguchi Makiya)’s campaign against the Uesugi, but clashes with him over strategy. Meanwhile, Chika falls under suspicion of secret dealings with another warlord. Seeking the truth, Koichiro goes to a village she has been visiting, where he uncovers the painful past she has long kept hidden.

programme.title: Special Drama "Guilty, the AI said" (R)
programme.desc: Starring Yoshine Kyoko, the drama follows Kouenji Madoka, a rookie judge struggling under a heavy caseload when an experimental AI judge system is introduced. While Madoka remains wary of the technology, veteran judge Hiba Katsuhiro-presiding with her over a murder case involving a son accused of killing his father-grows increasingly reliant on the AI’s verdict. Determined to uncover the truth on her own, Madoka pursues a conclusion different from the AI’s.

programme.title: BS Special "Dull Gray Diamonds"
programme.desc: In western India lies a town known as the "Diamond City," where rough diamonds from around the world are cut and polished by low‑paid craftsmen who have long supported the global diamond industry. Now, lab‑grown diamonds-mass‑produced through science and sold at less than one‑tenth the price of natural stones-are rapidly reshaping the market. As natural diamond prices fall by 40 percent and major companies suffer huge losses, life in the Diamond City itself is being shaken.

programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar - EP 22
programme.desc: In this bold yet heartbreaking story, a mother and daughter-in-law meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love - EP 28
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classics of the century are born again! Classic songs are reinterpreted by the best idol groups in Korea! Don't miss this beautiful competition with heart-moving moments that transcend generations!

programme.title: The Seasons - EP 7
programme.desc: When the end of one week meets the start of another week, this talk show will bring you music and stories that soothe your worries and concerns.

programme.title: ASEAN·Korea Music Festival <ROUND in Philippines>
programme.desc: ASEAN·Korea Music Festival is a public cultural diplomacy project that aims to expand cooperation between ASEAN and Korea and foster cultural exchange among young people across Asia through popular music.

programme.title: Special Drama for the Day of Persons with Disabilities: "Allargando"
programme.desc: KBS World continues to bring entertaining and informative programmes to viewers!

programme.title: KRAZY RICH KOREAN - EP 5
programme.desc: Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world? Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programme.title: Boss in the Mirror - EP 356
programme.desc: Korean celebrity-bosses go through self-examination to create a better working environment for their employees.

programme.title: Immortal Songs 2 - EP 755
programme.desc: The true classics of the century are born again! Classic songs are reinterpreted by the best idol groups in Korea! Don't miss this beautiful competition with heart-moving moments that transcend generations!

programme.title: Recipe for Love - EP 29
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life - EP 4
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family "reboot" drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Dear.M - EP 4
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unravelling a pink-hued mystery as the search goes on for 'M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan, Kai-shum and their chums team up to raise funds, causing Zodiac HK Hospital share price to plummet abnormally. They then launch a hostile takeover. Lau-suet and Kai-ching are persuaded to sell their Zodiac shares, but they both simply refuse. Kai-shum’s funds are withheld by Wing-sing because Wing-sing does not want Yui-fai to be implicated due to market manipulation.
